_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: If the 78.3% August 2024 bottom analog holds and stablecoin accumulation continues, the market should transition from Denial to Disbelief as early recovery skepticism sets in, but divergences prevent conviction in either direction.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with low conviction citing divergence risks; narrative writer implies LONG with high conviction citing accumulation squeeze setup
